title: Reading and Use of English - Part 4
description: For questions 25 – 30, complete the second sentence so that it has a similar meaning to the first sentence, using the word given. Do not change the word given. You must use between three and six words, including the word given. Here is an example (0).

questions.firstSentence: He forgot to mention that he was bringing a friend to the party.
questions.afterGap: he was bringing a friend was unexpected.

questions.firstSentence: No one has ever found a solution to this problem.
I'm sure it was John you saw at the cinema yesterday.
questions.beforeGap: The person you saw at the cinema yesterday

questions.firstSentence: The meeting was so boring that I fell asleep.
You can stay here as long as you keep quiet.
The manager told the staff they should work harder.
